title: Global sea surface temperatures are reaching record highs [Commentary]
summary: Rising Sea Surface Temperatures (SST) and their seasonal fluctuations have emerged as among the most visible indicators of a warming planet. Yet, while public discourse on global warming tends to focus on rising air temperatures driven by anthropogenic greenhouse gas emissions, the increase in SST and its profound consequences remain underemphasised. Oceans absorb the vast […]
